tasks.subject: Task 0: Install Capacitor and scaffold config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Capacitor deps + capacitor.config.ts pointing at dist/.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["capacitor.config.ts", "package.json", "docs/mobile-app/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "npx cap --version && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npx cap --version prints 6.x", "capacitor.config.ts has appId se.cleverdog.kundportal", "npm run build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: App-only route tree (hide marketing + admin)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mobile bundle contains only /login, /kund routes. Admins see 'use web portal' screen.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/AppMobile.tsx", "src/main.tsx", "src/components/MobileAuthGate.tsx", "src/lib/platform.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run app:build && Get-ChildItem dist/assets/js | Select-String AdminPage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No AdminPage chunk in app bundle", "Admin login shows MobileAuthGate", "Customer login lands on /kund"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add Android platform and first run
tasks.description:
**Goal:** android/ project committed, app launches on emulator showing login.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["android/", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "npx cap sync android", "acceptanceCriteria": ["android/ committed", "npx cap sync succeeds", "App runs on emulator, login screen visible, sign-in lands on /kund"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: cleverdog:// URL scheme + deep-link handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** App handles cleverdog:// links and routes to right page.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml", "src/lib/deepLinks.ts", "src/AppMobile.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "manual: paste cleverdog://kund into emulator browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Intent filter for cleverdog scheme", "appUrlOpen listener navigates to correct path", "Supabase redirect URLs include cleverdog://login*"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Native session persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Customer remains logged in after app close/reopen.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/sessionPersistence.ts", "src/lib/supabase.ts"], "verifyCommand": "manual: login -> force-quit -> reopen -> still logged in", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Supabase auth uses Capacitor Preferences on native", "Session survives app restart"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: device_tokens table + RLS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New table maps user_id -> push tokens, RLS lets users manage own.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["supabase/migrations/20260520_001_device_tokens.sql"], "verifyCommand": "select policyname from pg_policies where tablename='device_tokens';", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Table exists with correct columns", "RLS policies: users manage own, admins read all", "Unique (user_id, token)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Push registration + Firebase/APNs setup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** App registers FCM token on login, saves to device_tokens.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/pushNotifications.ts", "src/AppMobile.tsx", "src/pages/LoginPage.tsx", "android/app/google-services.json", "docs/mobile-app/firebase-setup.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual: login on emulator -> permission prompt -> token row in device_tokens", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Permission prompt on first login", "FCM token saved to device_tokens row", "Firebase setup docs cover Android + iOS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Edge function sends push alongside email
tasks.description:
**Goal:** send-notification fans out to FCM for booking_decision, staff_message.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["supabase/functions/send-notification/push.ts", "supabase/functions/send-notification/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "manual: admin approves booking -> push arrives on emulator", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Push arrives for booking decisions + staff messages", "Email still works (additive)", "Push failure does not 500 the function"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Foreground toast + tap-to-navigate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In-app toast for foreground pushes; tap any push navigates to right screen.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/customer/NotificationToast.tsx", "src/lib/pushNotifications.ts", "src/AppMobile.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "manual: send test push, see toast / tap to navigate", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Foreground push shows toast for 5s", "Tap routes by data.kind"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Splash, icons, status bar, safe-area
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Native feel - branded splash, icon, status bar, notch safety.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/icon-source.png", "android/app/src/main/res/", "src/AppMobile.tsx", "src/index.css"], "verifyCommand": "manual: visual check on Pixel 7 Pro emulator", "acceptanceCriteria": ["App icon shows CleverDog logo", "Splash with logo on #fcf5ee", "Status bar dark text on light bg", "No clipping on notched devices"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Native camera picker for dog photos
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Native action sheet for camera/photo library on iOS/Android.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/photoPicker.ts", "src/components/customer/"], "verifyCommand": "manual: tap photo upload on Android emulator", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Native picker on app", "Web fallback still works on dev", "Upload to Supabase storage unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Codemagic CI for iOS TestFlight + Android internal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Push to main triggers Codemagic, uploads to TestFlight + Play internal.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["codemagic.yaml", "docs/mobile-app/store-submission.md"], "verifyCommand": "git push -> watch Codemagic dashboard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["First Codemagic run green", "TestFlight build appears in 30 min", "Play Internal track shows build"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Production submission to App Store + Play Store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Store listings complete, first prod build submitted.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/mobile-app/store-submission.md"], "verifyCommand": "App Store/Play Console listing dashboards", "acceptanceCriteria": ["App Store listing complete with screenshots", "Play Store listing complete", "Privacy policy hosted with mobile section", "First build submitted for review"]}
```
